purpose: Scoring rubric the guardian applies before a ux-design deliverable is marked done.

dimensions.criterion: Exactly one routes: playbook was Read; no second playbook or cluster skim.
Output follows the routed playbook's documented deliverable shape.
Every non-obvious claim carries an Alfa tag; heuristic Blockers stay [SUPUESTO] until tested.
Success = yellow #FFD700 (never green); no hex literals outside :root; WCAG AA 4.5:1 body / 3:1 large.
For critiques: strengths named, issues severity-sorted, observation -> impact -> suggestion, each tied to user goal.
No green-as-success, no invented metrics or prices, no client PII, single brand.

pass_rule: PASS only when no fail_if_zero dimension scores 0 and total >= 80% of max weighted score.
